testcase.name: test_search_stocks_by_ticker_aapl
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_features.py:28: in test_search_stocks_by_ticker_aapl assert "Apple" in aapl["name"] E AssertionError: assert 'Apple' in 'AAPL'

testcase.name: test_search_stocks_by_partial_ticker
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_features.py:42: in test_search_stocks_by_partial_ticker assert "Microsoft" in msft["name"] E AssertionError: assert 'Microsoft' in 'MSFT'

testcase.name: test_search_stocks_by_name_partial
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_features.py:56: in test_search_stocks_by_name_partial assert "Alphabet" in googl["name"] E AssertionError: assert 'Alphabet' in 'GOOGL'

testcase.name: test_screen_specific_tickers
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_features.py:90: in test_screen_specific_tickers assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_screen_empty_query_returns_error_or_empty
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_features.py:199: in test_screen_empty_query_returns_error_or_empty assert response.status_code in [200, 422] E assert 429 in [200, 422] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
